extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael won from 30-rider breakaway with DSM placing 5 riders; GROSSHARTNER Felix missed red jersey by 8 seconds after sitting in GC group.
tactical_patterns: DSM deployed 5 of 9 riders into breakaway, overwhelming numerical advantage secured STORER stage win over individual strength.
GROSSHARTNER Felix lost red jersey by 8 seconds after conservative riding in GC group instead of attacking on final climb.
YATES Adam set exceptionally high tempo for BERNAL on final climb, unusual domestique aggression for teammate already down on GC.
Movistar lost tactical advantage (3 in top 5) when VALVERDE crashed, neutralizing planned numerical attack on ROGLIC.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: Finished aggressive DSM team effort, strong enough to drop VERONA Carlos on steep final kilometers after full stage in break.
rider_signals.GROßSCHARTNER Felix: negative: Miscalculated time gaps on final climb, lost red jersey by 8 seconds through passive riding in GC group.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Rode exceptionally hard tempo for BERNAL despite losing time in crash stage 2, strong domestique form early race.
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: High-speed crash eliminated Movistar's 3-in-top-5 numerical advantage before critical mountain stage finished.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Dropped significantly on final climb, distanced from ROGLIC group on stage expected to favor him.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Also distanced from GC group on Balcon de Alicante, unexpected weakness for Ineos co-leader.
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: negative: Dropped far from finish on final climb, Bahrain struggling to support LANDA.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Defended red jersey without strong team support, but Movistar unable to exploit numerical advantage after VALVERDE crash.
